message:
fix: clean up unused code warnings and add heredoc allowlist config

- Add #[allow(dead_code)] annotations to deadline_exceeded and
  remaining_below functions reserved for future hook mode support
- Add content_allowlist field to HeredocSettings initialization
- Fix Redis suggestion documentation improvements
- Add tests for docker, kubernetes, and database suggestion rules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
